notes: Conservative starter Bash denylist for Codex PreToolUse enforcement. Full-word match required per .opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/mcp_server/hooks/codex/pre-tool-use.ts. Review + extend based on operator needs. Dual key aliases (`bashDenylist` and `bash_denylist`) provided to match both the shipped adapter field name and the Phase 024 operator-facing contract.

openDesignPreconditions.description: Design-feeding/mutating Open Design write tools that require a valid design proof token before execution. Read and transport tools are intentionally absent so legitimate transport is never blocked. Each write tool is listed in its wired forms (bare, native-MCP, and Code-Mode UTCP) because the hook matches the tool name by exact membership.
openDesignPreconditions.guardedOdCommandsDescription: Design-mutating Open Design CLI verbs that require a valid design proof token (carried in-command via --design-proof <file> or OD_DESIGN_PROOF_FILE=<file>). Read-only od verbs are intentionally absent so legitimate transport is never blocked. Matched against the od command candidate (with the od prefix).
